# pexip_infinity_permission (Data Source)

Reads a permission configuration from the Infinity service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pexip_infinity_permission" "example" {
  name = "Can create conferences"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the permission.

### Read-Only

- `codename` (String) The codename of the permission.
- `id` (String) Resource URI for the permission in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the permission in Infinity
- `resource_uri` (String) The API resource URI for the permission.
